# Release Title

Short one-line summary of the release.

## Highlights

- Highlight the most important user-facing change.
- Highlight the most important platform or admin improvement.
- Highlight any major stability, performance, or DX win.

## What's New

- New feature or flow.
- New page, integration, or capability.
- New admin or operational functionality.

## Improvements

- UX, validation, reliability, or architecture improvements.
- Performance, caching, observability, or security improvements.
- Tooling, CI, or maintainability improvements.

## Fixes

- Important bug fix.
- Important edge-case or data-consistency fix.
- Any payment, auth, or permissions fix.

## Documentation

- Updated README, architecture docs, or release process.

## Notes

- Mention any known limitations, follow-up work, or non-breaking operational notes.

## Full Changelog

- Compare: `PREVIOUS_TAG...CURRENT_TAG`
